## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally with `pytest`
- [ ] Docs updated where needed
- [ ] No secrets, private paths, databases, or personal data committed
- [ ] Public API changes are documented
- [ ] Backward compatibility or migration notes are included if relevant

## Testing

Describe the tests or checks you ran.
